# Query SQL: Top 10 Clientes por Revenue

```sql
WITH ordenes_completadas AS (
    -- Filtramos órdenes completadas de los últimos 6 meses
    SELECT
        o.id,
        o.customer_id,
        o.total
    FROM orders o
    WHERE o.status = 'completed'
      AND o.created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTER
